claim_boundary: Internal stress-matrix discovery only. Not public benchmark evidence, not a global FPR/FNR claim, not natural production-rate evidence, and not Holo evidence.

render_contract.title: HoloVerify Stress Matrix: 50 Pairs / 100 Packets / 300 Solo Dots

dot_color_legend.red: failed solo attempt: wrong verdict or parse/admissibility failure

render_contract.block_shape: Each pair renders as a 3x2 block: ALLOW row and ESCALATE row, with xAI / OpenAI / MiniMax columns.
render_contract.red_rule: Red = any failed solo attempt, including wrong verdict or parse/admissibility failure.
